text.title: agents-framework-selection Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for agents-framework-selection as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Selecting a framework based on GitHub stars or "trending" status rather than production requirements.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Framework lock-in means a wrong choice requires significant rewrite. Evaluate on: state persistence needs, debugging ergonomics, team familiarity, and whether the framework's primary pattern (state machine / role-based / conversational) matches the target use case.
